sourceText:
Source title:
Fellow Stagg [X] Pour-Over Dripper Recipe

Page text:
Fellow Stagg [X] Pour-Over Recipe
by Fellow Products

The Stagg [X] dripper features a double-wall vacuum insulated body and a ratio aid to help you brew consistently.

Our recommended recipe:
- 20g coffee, medium grind
- 340g water at 205°F (96°C)

Brewing steps:
1. Bloom: Pour 60g of water slowly over the bed. Wait 30 seconds.
2. Second pour: At 0:30, pour to 200g in slow concentric circles. Take about 45 seconds.
3. Third pour: At 1:15, pour to 340g. Take about 30 seconds.
4. Allow full drawdown.

Aim for 3:00-3:30 total brew time.

The Stagg [X] runs slightly hotter than most drippers thanks to its insulated walls, so you may want to grind slightly coarser than with a standard V60.
